name: library-reservation-system-integrated
description: 図書予約システム統合パッケージ。MAIN backend (カゥン氏正本) と Tbackend (豊田テスト用) を ConfigFile で切替起動。

scripts.install:all: cd library-backend && npm install && cd ../library-Tbackend && npm install
scripts.init-db:main: cd library-backend && npx sequelize-cli db:migrate && npx sequelize-cli db:seed:all
scripts.init-db:all: npm run init-db:main && npm run init-db:test

author: Kaung Set Linn & Y.Toyoda
